items.claim: Tommy McMillan's current fighting style will not be effective against a higher-level opponent.
items.quote: unless he changes this game plan up dramatically from what we saw last time out, even though he had a great performance, never really looked like he was in a d any danger, was in control the whole time, it won't work against a guy like this.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan has poor footwork and tends to overswing on his strikes.
items.quote: finding himself kind of out of position. again, bad feet, overswinging on things.

items.claim: Alberto Montes will not be able to withstand Tommy McMillan's opening round pressure.
items.quote: I don't think that Montes is going to be able to weather that storm because he's not going to stand his ground as much as he needs to.

items.claim: Veronica Hardy withdrew from her fight due to a cut.
items.quote: I think she had a cut or something.

items.claim: Diani Barbosa has more experience and higher-level competition history than Anna Melisano.
items.quote: Diani Barbosa has more experience, has fought higher level competition

items.claim: Anna Melisano is taking this fight on short notice.
items.quote: Anna Melisano stepping in on short notice

items.claim: Austin Bashy is a superior MMA wrestler and grappler compared to José Delgado.
items.quote: Very good MMA wrestler, very good MMA grappler. And that's where he's better than José Delgado.

items.claim: José Delgado is a superior striker to Austin Bashy with more power and variety.
items.quote: José Delgado is much better on the feet. More power, more variety, just a better vocabulary of striking on the feet.

items.claim: José Delgado has been taken down by every UFC opponent he has faced.
items.quote: Outside of that Haidider Emil fight, he's been taken down by every UFC opponent he's had.

items.claim: José Delgado's knockout rate has decreased as he has faced higher-level competition.
items.quote: now that we've seen him kind of climb the ranks a bit and fight higher level competition, the knockouts aren't materializing as much.

items.claim: José Delgado and his training partner Mario Bautista were unable to train together for this fight due to conflicting camp schedules.
items.quote: They probably couldn't spend too much time together because he's got to fight 7 days later.
